Cheer100 call up DSP he will fix it for you all steps I'll share nowSign up for a dedicated AI TTS provider like Typecast, ElevenLabs, or Murf AI to access natural-sounding voices. Most of these services offer a direct integration widget for Streamlabs or StreamElements, or you can use their API via a custom bot. Once connected, add the service’s provided browser source URL as an overlay in your OBS or Streamlabs Desktop scene and adjust the audio settings to ensure it plays through your stream.
